pieces.name: hero
pieces.prompt: Cinematic dark editorial hero for a forensic AI-text authenticity platform. A luminous legal certificate document sealed with a molten gold wax seal dissolving into a network of glowing verification lines and floating SHA-256 hexadecimal light, over deep obsidian navy-black, volumetric golden rim light with faint cobalt-blue accents, chain-of-custody data threads, museum-grade luxury, ultra-detailed, dramatic low-key lighting, premium forensic aesthetic, no text, no logo, no watermark, no words

pieces.name: seal
pieces.prompt: Macro shot of a gold wax certification seal embossed with abstract concentric guilloche security engraving, cracking open to reveal glowing golden data particles and thin verification light-lines, obsidian black background, volumetric gold glow, forensic authenticity motif, cinematic, ultra-detailed, no text, no logo, no watermark, no words

pieces.name: forensic-data
pieces.prompt: Abstract forensic data visualization: streams of golden hexadecimal hash characters and stylometric waveform lines flowing across a dark obsidian field, fingerprint-like ridge patterns forming from light, faint cobalt-blue nodes, deep depth of field, cinematic volumetric glow, editorial premium tech aesthetic, no text, no logo, no watermark, no words
